zh.Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆
zh.High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Basset於1180年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset25歲，母親Aline de Gai21歲。她與John de Biset結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Basset于1180年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲Sir Alan Basset25岁，母亲Aline de Gai21岁。她与John de Biset结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Basset was born in 1180, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 25 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 21. She married John de Biset. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1224, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Basset est née en 1180, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John de Biset. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Basset 1180 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Basset 25 und ihre Mutter Aline de Gai 21. Sie hat John de Biset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Basset è nata il nel 1180 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John de Biset. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1224, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Bassetが1180年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは25歳，母Aline de Gaiは21歳であった。John de Bisetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Basset(이)가 1180년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John de Biset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Basset nasceu em 1180, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Biset. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Basset родилась в 1180 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Biset. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Basset nació en 1180, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John de Biset. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1224, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
